name: gti
description: A Claude Code plugin that enforces a closed-loop BDD→TDD development workflow — from natural language requirement to verified, passing tests — with full documentation output at every stage.

skills.name: gti-spec
skills.description: Setup worktree, brainstorm requirements → write .feature + spec.md, wait for human approval

skills.name: gti-test
skills.description: Generate empty test shells from feature file

skills.name: gti-impl
skills.description: Follow project conventions, fill all assertions → implement source code

skills.name: gti-verify
skills.description: Run full suite, verify coverage, generate conclusion.md
